title: Kam AI
shortDescription: A private AI that runs on your phone. Your words never leave it.
fullDescription:
Kam AI is a thinking and drafting tool that runs entirely on your phone. The AI is downloaded onto your device and runs right there, so your conversations never leave it. Turn on airplane mode and it still works.

It is not a companion. It has no persona, no roleplay, no pretend friendship. It is a plain tool for thinking out loud, working through a problem, and shaping text.

What you can do:

- Chat about anything, entirely offline.
- Logic Partner: it argues the other side of your idea and pokes holes in your reasoning, without being contrary for its own sake.
- Workbench: paste text in and tighten it, rewrite it, or reorganize it into points.
- Discover: read a short, interesting passage built from Wikipedia, then discuss it or test yourself with a quick quiz. Everything works offline once a pack is downloaded.
- Voice: talk instead of typing, transcribed on the phone, and have answers read aloud.
- Flag any answer you want to check later, and it collects in Follow-ups.
- Open it with a long-press of the power button, or from the text-selection menu in other apps.

Honest about the limits: the model is small enough to fit on a phone, so it knows less than the big cloud services and can misremember dates, names, and numbers. When an answer matters, flag it and check it. That is what Follow-ups are for. It sticks to text on purpose, so it cannot make images.

Privacy is a decision, not a feature bolted on. There are no accounts, no ads, no tracking, and nothing to sign up for. The app only touches the internet when you ask it to, like downloading a model or a content pack. Everything you type is stored encrypted on your phone. Move it all to a new phone with the built-in encrypted backup.

The code is public and the license keeps it open. That is a rule, not a promise.

Built and carried by one person. If software made this way matters to you, there is a place to stand behind it. Either way, it is yours.
